home.hero_badge: Saudi Arabia's First Specialized Fresh Juice Factory
home.hero_subtitle: Kyan Foods — Saudi Arabia's first specialized fresh juice manufacturer, delivering exceptional quality with no additives or preservatives.
home.about_text: Kyan Foods is a leading Saudi company in the manufacturing and distribution of fresh fruit juices. We uphold the highest standards of quality and food safety, committed to delivering 100% natural products free from any additives or preservatives.
home.why_natural_text: Fresh juices completely free from artificial additives and preservatives
home.why_quality_text: We apply the highest quality and food safety standards at every production stage
home.why_custom_text: We offer flexible packaging and branding solutions tailored to client requirements
home.why_b2b_text: Complete services for businesses and distributors across Saudi Arabia and GCC
home.products_title: A Wide Range of Fresh Juices
home.products_subtitle: From fresh orange to Ramadan drinks, we offer a diverse range to suit all tastes and occasions
home.mission_title: Building a Healthier, More Natural Future
home.mission_text: Our vision is to be the leading company in fresh juice manufacturing across the Arabian Gulf region, achieving this through commitment to quality, innovation, and sustainability.
home.contact_subtitle: We welcome companies and distributors looking to offer fresh, high-quality products to their customers

about.title: Kyan Foods — A Story of Excellence
about.subtitle: Saudi Arabia's First Specialized Fresh Juice Factory
about.overview_text1: Kyan Foods is a Saudi company specializing in the manufacturing of natural fresh fruit juices, founded with the mission of delivering healthy, high-quality products that reflect the values of purity and nature.
about.overview_text2: The company uses the latest pressing, filling, and packaging technologies while preserving the natural nutritional properties of the fruit — with no additives or preservatives.
about.overview_text3: We are proud to be Saudi Arabia's first specialized fresh juice factory at this level of quality and professionalism, with high production capacity to meet local and regional market demands.
about.commitment_text: We believe the best juices are those that retain their natural essence. That's why we're committed to using carefully selected fresh fruit and firmly reject any artificial additives.
about.quality_text: Quality is not an option for us — it's a steadfast commitment at every step of production. We apply the strictest quality standards from raw material selection to the product reaching consumers.
about.safety_text: We adhere to the highest international food safety standards and are pursuing ISO and HACCP certifications to confirm our commitment to these standards.
about.factory_text: Kyan Foods is proud to be Saudi Arabia's first specialized fresh fruit juice factory, equipped with the latest global equipment and technology.

mission.title: Towards a Healthier Future
mission.subtitle: Leading the transformation of natural juice manufacturing in Saudi Arabia and the Gulf
mission.mission_text: To deliver fresh, natural, high-quality fruit juices to consumers in Saudi Arabia and the GCC, maintaining the highest food safety standards and quality commitment at every production stage.
mission.vision_text: To be the first and most trusted name in fresh fruit juice manufacturing across the Arabian Gulf region, contributing to a culture of healthy natural nutrition.
mission.value1_text: We maintain transparency and honesty in all our dealings with customers and partners
mission.value2_text: We never compromise on the high quality standards in everything we offer
mission.value3_text: We continuously strive to develop and innovate our products and processes
mission.value4_text: We maintain environmentally and socially responsible practices in all our activities
mission.leadership_text: We aim to expand our operations to all GCC countries, becoming the trusted partner for the region's largest distribution and hospitality chains.

products.title: Our Fresh Juice Range
products.subtitle: 100% natural juices with no additives or preservatives, available in sizes for all needs
products.sizes_text: We offer a wide range of packaging sizes to suit all needs, from individual 125ml portions to commercial 50L bulk sizes.
products.validity_text: Our product shelf life ranges from 7 days for fresh juices to 12 months for some heat-treated products, while maintaining nutritional value.
products.packaging_text: We offer diverse packaging options including food-grade plastic, glass, and Tetra Pak, with full custom branding available.
products.product1_desc: 100% freshly squeezed orange juice, rich in natural Vitamin C
products.product2_desc: Premium fresh pomegranate juice, rich in natural antioxidants
products.product3_desc: Fresh thick guava juice with an authentic tropical taste
products.product4_desc: Fresh carrot juice rich in beta-carotene and Vitamin A
products.product5_desc: A unique blend of fresh mango, pineapple, and guava
products.product6_desc: A luxurious Ramadan drink with natural dates and fresh milk
products.product7_desc: Traditional apricot Ramadan drink made with authentic recipe
products.product8_desc: Fresh mango juice with a rich and concentrated tropical flavor

why.title: The Difference We Make
why.subtitle: Combining nature and technology to deliver the best fresh fruit juices in the region
why.diff1_text: Pioneers in fresh fruit juice manufacturing in Saudi Arabia
why.diff2_text: Full natural commitment — no preservatives, artificial colors, or manufactured flavors
why.diff3_text: We use the latest pressing and filling equipment to maintain product quality and freshness
why.diff4_text: Capable of meeting client requirements in blend, packaging, and branding
why.quality_text: Every product undergoes rigorous quality checks at every production stage, from raw material receipt to final shipment.
why.iso_text: We are pursuing ISO 22000 and HACCP certifications to confirm our commitment to the highest international food safety standards.
why.b2b_text: We provide comprehensive services for businesses and distributors including: regular supply, flexible quantities, logistical support, and long-term partnerships.
why.custom_text: We allow our clients — establishments, hotels, and restaurants — to customize the product under their own brand with the specifications they define.

contact.title: We'd Love to Hear From You
contact.subtitle: Interested in partnering with us or want to learn more about our products? Our team is ready to answer all your inquiries

contact.message_placeholder: Tell us about your needs or inquiries
